mapper.sql:
SELECT ID, STORAGE_YARD_NM, SHORT_CD, AREA, WORK_AREA_CD, SORT_NUM, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY_NAME FROM M_HQ_STORAGE_YARD
and STORAGE_YARD_NM LIKE #{storageYardNm}
mapper.select:
SELECT ID, STORAGE_YARD_NM, SHORT_CD, AREA, WORK_AREA_CD, SORT_NUM, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY_NAME FROM M_HQ_STORAGE_YARD
id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO M_HQ_STORAGE_YARD(ID, STORAGE_YARD_NM, SHORT_CD, AREA, WORK_AREA_CD, SORT_NUM, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME ) VALUES ( #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{storageYardNm, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{shortCd, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{area, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{workAreaCd, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sortNum, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{now} )
mapper.update:
UPDATE M_HQ_STORAGE_YARD SET ID = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, STORAGE_YARD_NM = #{storageYardNm,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SHORT_CD = #{shortCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, AREA = #{area,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, WORK_AREA_CD = #{workAreaCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SORT_NUM = #{sortNum,jdbcType=INTEGER}, UPDATE_BY = #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, UPDATE_BY_NAME = #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_TIME = #{now}
id = #{id}
